examples: The row broke after the girl uploaded pictures of what she claimed were her Maserati and Lamborghini cars, expensive handbags and palatial villa.
Palatial office buildings are being constructed in the city.
We lived in a palatial house with maids.
He spent the last 8 years building this palatial estate in guard-gated Bradbury Estates.
Paul Bates, a patient from Torpoint in Cornwall, described the new unit as "palatial".
